name: ticket-seat-booking-root
description: Root workspace for Ticket Seat Booking application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
